title: mineDimension
description: Simple mod that add mining dimension. Just stop griefing your fancy overworld :)
body:
This mod add custom mining dimension with unique world generated ore that is needed to enter mining dimension.

 

With this mod player don't need to grief world and can simply go to mining dimension to mine ores or rocks.

 

Currently mod adds following features:

  - Custom Mining Dimension
  - new ore "Vortexite" (generate with bedrock in overworld)
  - recipes
  - Advancements
  - forge:ores tag generation supported


This mod can be freely distributed without permission.
